tasks.label: Deploy (with build check)
tasks.command: npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "${input:commitMessage}" && git push origin main && echo '' && echo '✓ Pushed commit '$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)' to main.' && echo '  Watch the deploy: https://vercel.com/dashboard' && echo '  Status flips to Ready in 1-3 min.' && echo '  Production: https://scratch-classroom.vercel.app'

tasks.label: Quick Deploy (skip build check)
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m "${input:commitMessage}" && git push origin main && echo '' && echo '✓ Pushed commit '$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)' to main.' && echo '  Watch the deploy: https://vercel.com/dashboard' && echo '  Production: https://scratch-classroom.vercel.app'
